statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

article.description: Desi Rodriguez had a career-high 18 points and Khadeen Carrington scored 14 to lift Seton Hall to a 67-59 victory over Bradley at the Charleston Classic on Friday night.
article.headline: Rodriguez scores 18 in Seton Hall's 67-59 win
article.linkText: Rodriguez scores 18 in Seton Hall's 67-59 win
article.story: CHARLESTON, S.C. -- Desi Rodriguez had a career-high 18 points and Khadeen Carrington scored 14 to lift Seton Hall to a 67-59 victory over Bradley at the Charleston Classic on Friday night. The Pirates (3-1) recovered from a tournament-opening loss to Long Beach State by holding off the Braves (2-3) down the stretch. Seton Hall closes the eight-team tournament by facing Mississippi in the fifth-place game Sunday. Bradley takes on Towson in the seventh-place game, the loser getting shut out in Charleston. The Pirates guaranteed they wouldn't face that by opening a double-digit lead early that Bradley could not overcome. Veer Singh hit two 3-pointers and Rodriguez had 6 straight points to put Seton Hall ahead 25-15. Bradley closed to 56-52 in the final six minutes on a driving layup by Dwayne Lautier-Ogunleye. However, Rodriguez and Carrington hit consecutive baskets to build the lead back. Lautier-Ogunleye finished with 19 points for Bradley.
